Video.summary: Sable suspects girlfriend Mechelle of giving extra during her massage practice and petitions her to take a polygraph test.
Video.title: Myers vs. Crossland

Video.summary: Malik is here to peition the court for a paternity test after believing his girlfriend was cheating on him.
Video.title: Unplanned Parenthood

Video.summary: Brian is being sued by his wife Doretha for an illegal eviction after she left when he brought another woman home.
Video.title: Three's a Crowd

Video.summary: A lie detector test could decide the fate of Andrecia and Alfred's tumultuous marriage filled with suspicion and regret.
Video.title: Taylor vs. Taylor

Video.summary: Sade confronts her boyfriend, Jeremy, in court about his gambling addiction and bill money spent on lottery tickets.
Video.title: Black vs. Wiles

Video.summary: The Stallworths bring their relational issues to the Cutlers in a last ditch effort to save their marriage.
Video.title: Stallworth vs Stallworth

Video.summary: A mom says a crooked landlord is overcharging and taking advantage of her while she searches for a home for her disabled daughter; a tax refund goes missing, and the plaintiff says her ex-girlfriend is responsible.
Video.title: Lease of Faith

Video.summary: A vicious dog attack reportedly left the plaintiff with over $2,000 in medical bills, but the defendant insists that his dog attacked in self-defense; a phone and property damage have two cousins in court.
Video.title: Paw and Order

Video.summary: A landlord sues his former tenants for unpaid rent and late fees; an unfinished floor remodeling job and reportedly unwanted sexual advances bring ex-friends to court.
Video.title: Remodeling Regrets

Video.summary: First, plaintiff suing because he was struck by vehicle. Then, a man claims ex destroyed his property.
Video.title: Who Hit Who?

Video.summary: First, a woman sues her brother for failure to repay a loan! Then, the plaintiff sues for rental repayment.
Video.title: Pay Up or Get Out

Video.summary: A hit-and-run defendant admits there was a crash but says the plaintiff failed to come to a complete stop; former friends are entangled in a legal rumble as one is suing for two lost phones, while the other is countersuing for breach of contract.
Video.title: Crash, Cash and Conflict

Video.summary: First, you shouldn’t do business with your friends! Then, a woman says she was never paid for services.
Video.title: Business with Friends

Video.summary: A woman sues her ex-boyfriend for car damage, while he countersues for destruction of his personal property; a landlord hopes to recoup money for damages and unpaid rent.
Video.title: Love and Legal Damage

Video.summary: Nicholas Grassa sues Merri Phillips for $145 in extra labor costs after a power steering pump he bought was deemed defective by his mechanic. Merri claims the pump was in perfect condition and blames the mechanic's skills.
Video.title: Car Parts Dealer Disaster

Video.summary: Ehab sues for $5,000, claiming Melissa and Forest rear-ended his car, causing injuries and damage. The defendants counter, alleging Ehab braked suddenly, causing the crash. They deny wrongdoing and file a $2,300 counterclaim for bumper repairs.
Video.title: Rear-End Ruckus

Video.summary: A battling couple face off in court over trust, heartbreak and the custody of their beloved rabbit, Oreo.
Video.title: McCoy vs. Norman

Video.summary: Megan and David face the truth as shocking revelations and a polygraph test could change their relationship forever.
Video.title: Antonucci vs. Tamez

Video.summary: A woman accuses her boyfriend of being an inconvenience and a drunk, but a shocking reveal could turn the whole case on its head.
Video.title: Braddy vs. Scott

Video.summary: Devout religion and a party lifestyle collide in Texas couple Lamonte and Leola's relationship.
Video.title: Hawley vs. Gibson

Video.summary: A workplace romance takes a dramatic turn as Jarius seeks the truth about his paternity of 1-year-old Legacii.
Video.title: Childs vs. Macon

Video.summary: A sports betting addiction brings Erica and her boyfriend to court.
Video.title: East vs. Conner

Video.summary: Thirteen years and 20 breakups later, Lakeia and Shundric leave the fate of their relationship up to a compatibility test.
Video.title: White vs. Loyd

Video.summary: Angela is prepared to call off her wedding if her fiancée, Juan, proves to have been unfaithful.
Video.title: Martinez vs. Rodriguez

Video.summary: Yoko and Damien seek counsel from the judges on issues including parenting, property damage, and an online shopping addiction.
Video.title: Smith vs. Smith

Video.summary: James, a self-proclaimed "Karma Casanova," must answer for his disrespectful behavior in his relationship with girlfriend Shana.
Video.title: Few vs. Roundtree

Video.summary: Accusations of cheating mixed with short tempers is a recipe for disaster in D’Mitry and Jessica’s relationship.
Video.title: Hartfield vs. Saunders

Video.summary: Perrion and Steven didn't last as a couple but hope to make it as business partners; it may be time for a drug test.
Video.title: Roberts vs. Powell

Video.summary: With the help of an expert witness, the judges address the extravagant spending habits in Ayahna and Clarence's marriage.
Video.title: James vs. James

Video.summary: A woman confronts her long-lost father to uncover the truth about her paternity and reclaim her identity.
Video.title: Brown vs. Smith

Video.summary: Accusations of cheating, a nightclub altercation and severe damage to a car find exes Timothy and Krystaly in court.
Video.title: Hariston vs. Figueroa

Video.summary: Tavares Brown sues David Thompson for $5,000, claiming false accusations of pulling a gun got him arrested and cost him money. Thompson countersues for $5,000, insisting Brown threatened him with a gun.
Video.title: You Lied to the Police and Got Me Arrested!

Image.alt: You Lied to the Police and Got Me Arrested!
You Lied to the Police and Got Me Arrested!
You Lied to the Police and Got Me Arrested!

Video.summary: Desta Krupa sues neighbor Marie for $571.67, claiming she’s stuck paying for an Xbox and iPod bought on her line of credit. Marie counters, blaming payment issues on the credit company and says the iPod was a gift.
Video.title: Feuding Friends

Video.summary: Desherica Smith claims her mother owes her for covering food and bills while she lived there and insists she doesn’t owe rent. Shocked her mom is suing, she feels the case is petty. Desherica believes they’re even and expects to win.
Video.title: Mother/Daughter Courtroom Drama

Video.summary: Barbara claims Sandra reneged on a deal to exchange a show dog for a female puppy from a litter, suing for $3,000. Sandra argues no puppy was promised, as her dog wasn’t in heat.
Video.title: Doggie Paternity Disaster

Video.summary: Jessica is suing her ex-boyfriend, stating he attacked her after accusing her of sleeping with his cousin.
Video.title: You're Just Toxic

Video.summary: The plaintiff says that after she found a provocative message from another woman in her live-in boyfriend's phone, he became violent, and she was forced to hide in a closet; she sues him for repayment of loans; he says she was the aggressor.
Video.title: Live-In Liar

Video.summary: Chanel is suing her ex for a gift and emotional distress after finding out he's been texting other women.
Video.title: What Happened in Vegas?

Video.summary: Lynn believes his wife was cheating on him in their relationship, now he's here to be paid back for a loan.
Video.title: Fuming Over a Mobile Home

Video.summary: Tylan is suing his great aunt, saying she hired him to paint her house but failed to pay.
Video.title: Family’s Not Cut Out to Work Together

Image.alt: Family’s Not Cut Out to Work Together
Family’s Not Cut Out to Work Together
Family’s Not Cut Out to Work Together

Video.summary: McKenzie is suing her baby's father for the price of a car because he chooses work and football over family.
Video.title: Football Over Family

Video.summary: Liatwanne petitions the court for rehab for her son, saying he's an addict who started using drugs as a teen.
Video.title: Running with the Wrong Crowd

Video.summary: First, woman claims girl quit cheer team after begging to join. Then, a man claims girlfriend assaulted him.
Video.title: Cheer Leaver

Video.summary: First, a woman wants reimbursement for temporary loan. Then, plaintiff claims unpaid rent and damages.
Video.title: Going Under

Video.summary: Stacy claims her mom Sherry promised to support her in college. Sherry says she's jobless and can't afford her allowance.
Video.title: The Long Con

Video.summary: First, a sister sues her brother for $5000. Then, a woman claims a man stole her puppy.
Video.title: Oh, Brother

Video.summary: First, plaintiff claims ex-wife let him unpaid bills. Then, it’s a case of hit and run.
Video.title: Hit and Ruin

Video.summary: First, business owner claims the defendant failed to pay him. Then, plaintiff is suing for a plane ticket.
Video.title: Cleaning House

Video.summary: A woman sues for $5,000 because, she says, a dog charged her and caused her to fall and break her wrist; a woman wants a tattoo artist to return her money for services not rendered.
Video.title: It's All in the Wrist
